LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Title: STRATEGIC_OVERVIEW // Strategic Overview
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Slogan: DEFINING THE FUTURE OF PLANETARY SECURITY
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Description: USAC is the leading force in interstellar resource monopoly and armed trade. Through the orbital settlement network, we ensure absolute asset liquidity.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Bento.Products.Title: ARMORY_CATALOG
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Bento.Products.Desc: Catalog of authorized weapons and mechanized systems
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Bento.Assets.Title: FINANCIAL_TERMINAL
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Bento.Assets.Desc: Credit assets and debt leverage management
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Bento.Legal.Title: COMPLIANCE
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Bento.Legal.Desc: Legal clauses and automated collection protocols
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Bento.Services.Title: CORPORATE_SERVICES
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Home.Bento.Services.Desc: Customized corporate support and remote asset maintenance
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Products.Title: AUTHORIZED_PRODUCT_CATALOG // Authorized Catalog
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Detail.Title: PRODUCT_SPECIFICATION // Product Specification
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Title: ASSET_TERMINAL // Asset Terminal
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.SyncStatus: Synchronizing orbital settlement network database in real time...
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.NoAgreement: Warning: No valid asset collateral agreement has been established.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Apply.Title: RISK_PRICING_APPLICATION // Risk Pricing Application
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Apply.Warning: Warning: You are trading higher interest and risk fees for a larger credit line. Once signed, the USAC orbital collection system will enforce this contract without exception. Any missed payment will trigger asset seizure action.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.MissedWarning: ⚠ Missed payments: {0}! One more miss will trigger forced collection!
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Block.LowCredit: Credit score too low (requires ≥30). Financing channel has been disabled.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Block.LowWealth: Current asset valuation is insufficient for the requested limit. Increase the rate plan to pass assessment.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Warning.Caution: Missed payments: {0}. Credit score continues to decline. Please settle promptly.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Warning.Critical: ⚠ Missed payments: {0}! One more miss will immediately trigger forced collection procedures!
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.InterestPanel.Title: INTEREST_SETTLEMENT // Interest Settlement
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.RepayPanel.Title: PRINCIPAL_REPAYMENT // Principal Repayment
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.RepaySurcharge: Repay Principal ({0} Credit Bonds, incl. surcharge {1})
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Legal.Title: LEGAL_COMPLIANCE // Legal Compliance
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Legal.Clause01.Title: Clause 01: Asset Priority
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Legal.Clause01.Desc: In any default scenario, USAC holds absolute first-priority collection rights over all local material assets.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Legal.Clause02.Title: Clause 02: Automated Enforcement
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Legal.Clause02.Desc: The collection process is automatically directed by orbital platforms. No manual defense or extension requests will be accepted.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Legal.Footer: Warning: Entering this portal constitutes default acknowledgement and signature of all agreements listed above. The USAC Asset Collection Division assumes no liability for incidental civilian casualties or secondary harm during collection operations.
LanguageData.USAC_PaymentSuccess: [USAC] {0} write-off complete. Credit score has been increased.
LanguageData.USAC_InsufficientBonds: [USAC] Payment failed: Orbital satellites detected insufficient Credit Bonds within this area's beacon range.
LanguageData.USAC_LoanApproved: [USAC] Contract signed successfully: {0} assets have been delivered by orbital drop near the trade beacon.
LanguageData.USAC_FunctionInProgress: [USAC] Access restricted: This module is being upgraded, or your credit tier has not unlocked this permission.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Error.404.Title: CONNECTION_LOST // Connection Lost
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Error.404.Text: The requested resource is not registered on the USAC intranet, or your access privileges have been revoked.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Services.Title: CORPORATE_SERVICES // Corporate Services
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Services.Lease.Title: LEASE_SERVICES // Lease Services
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Services.Lease.Desc: USAC asset lease program. Heavy assault mining rigs are deployed by orbital platform to designated zones. 1,000 credits per 24-hour operation cycle. Supports dynamic cycle configuration and auto-renewal.
LanguageData.USAC_ActiveRigs: Asset Deployment Monitor // Active Deployed Rigs
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Services.Renewal.Title: REMOTE_RENEWAL // Remote Renewal
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Services.Renewal.Desc: Renews encrypted control-bandwidth links for temporary Mechnitor channels. By extending local data-relay authorization, this effectively prolongs uptime for non-permanent mech-control hubs.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Services.Renewal.NoMechnitor: No temporary Mechnitor bandwidth links detected within controlled range.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Services.Trader.Title: ORBITAL_TRADE_REQUEST // Orbital Trade Request
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Services.Trader.Desc: Send a priority trade request through the orbital settlement network. A USAC orbital trade ship will arrive in this area in approximately one hour.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Services.Trader.Status.Title: ORBITAL_INBOUND // Trade Ship Arrival Status
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Services.Trader.Status.Desc: USAC orbital trade ship is inbound
LanguageData.USAC.Message.TraderCalled: [USAC] Request accepted: A USAC orbital trade ship is en route to your location and is expected to arrive in about one hour.
LanguageData.USAC.Message.TraderArrived: [USAC] Orbital trade ship in position: The USAC orbital trade ship is now available for trading.
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.LeaseDrill: USAC orbital assault drill lease fee
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Renewal: Temporary bandwidth link renewal fee for {0}
LanguageData.USAC.Message.Renewed: [USAC] Renewal successful: 30-cycle bandwidth link has been renewed for {0}.
LanguageData.USAC.Message.AutoRenewed: [USAC] Auto-renewed: 30-cycle link duration has been automatically renewed for {0}.
LanguageData.USAC.Message.AutoRenewFailed: [USAC] Renewal suspended: Auto-renewal service for {0} has been disabled due to insufficient Credit Bond reserves within beacon range.
LanguageData.USAC.Message.InsufficientBonds: [USAC] Payment failed: Insufficient Credit Bond reserves within trade beacon range.
LanguageData.USAC.Message.InsufficientBondsForLease: [USAC] Lease suspended: Current Credit Bond reserves are insufficient for the selected initial lease duration.
LanguageData.USAC.Message.LeaseAutoRenewed: [USAC] Auto-renewed: The mining rig has been extended by 24 hours through the orbital settlement network.
LanguageData.USAC.Message.LeaseAutoRenewFailed: [USAC] Renewal failed: Insufficient Credit Bond reserves near the orbital beacon. Auto-renewal has been disabled for this rig and scheduled collection will proceed.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Drill.EmptyMinerals.Desc: Manually eject collected minerals from the sealed hold. Note: If not emptied before extraction, the USAC orbital platform will recover all onboard materials directly.
LanguageData.USAC.Alert.DebtRepayment.Label: USAC Debt Settlement
LanguageData.USAC.Alert.DebtRepayment.Explanation.Imm: ⚠ The nearest contract is due soon! Please prepare enough USAC bonds.
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Dialog.Repayment.Warning: ⚠ One more missed payment will trigger forced collection!
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Dialog.Repayment.Title: USAC {0} Settlement
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Message.ForceCollectPausedBySh: [USAC] Target colony is under orbital shielding; forced collection has been postponed.
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Log.LegacyMigrated: [USAC] Legacy debt data migrated to new contract system
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Transaction.MissedPayment: {0} missed payment #{1}; interest rolled into principal
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Message.GripperTargetLost: [USAC] Orbital gripper capture failed: target lost.
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Message.GripperDestroyedPenalt: [USAC] Orbital gripper destroyed! Additional fee ₿{0} has been added to the bill.
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Message.OrganHarvested: [USAC] Organ-mortgage collection executed: organs harvested from {0}, value ₿{1}
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Message.PawnDemolished: [USAC] Debt liquidation executed: {0} has been fully dismantled.
LanguageData.USAC.Debt.Message.CreditDanger: [USAC] Credit rating has dropped to dangerous levels. USAC trade channel will soon be closed.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.AccessDenied: ACCESS_DENIED//ACCESS DENIED.\n\n Insufficient permission to access...
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Settled.Title: DEBT_SETTLED//Debt write-off report
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Settled.Intro: Dear Interstellar Citizen：\n\nWe are pleased to inform you that all your asset-backed agreements filed with the Debt Management Department have been officially written off. Throughout the lengthy settlement process, you had demonstrated an exceptionally high level of commitment. Despite the unpredictable risks lurking in this RimWorld, you have proven that credit is the most universally accepted form of currency.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Settled.Close: Your credit history has been filed. The Debt Management Department has terminated risk monitoring of your settlement. We hope you will continue to maintain this exceptional level of compliance through out the furture.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Liquidation.Title: LIQUIDATION_COMPLETE//Asset liquidation confirmation
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Liquidation.Intro: The process has begun. Target asset location has been confirmed, and the Debt Management Department will begin the final asset liquidation. Everything is being done accordance with regulations.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Liquidation.Body: The piercing alarm was instantly shattered by a shriek from the sky. You looked up and saw dozens of massive steel clamps piercing the clouds, leaving orange trails behind them. With a violent clanging of metal, the roof you were on shattered instantly, and amidst the billowing smoke and dust, the heavy hum of the hydraulic clamps closing became the last picture of your home. You felt yourself being roughly gripped by the clamps, your face and body enveloped in a cold oxygen mask and spray coating. With the roar of the thrusters igniting again, gravity reversed completely in that moment. You saw the crops you had carefully tended, the bricks you had painstakingly laid, and your terrified companions, all plummeting rapidly into the distance...\n\nOr rather, you were all rapidly ascending into the boundless depths of space. Before the suffocating silence claimed everything, the last thing you saw was the desolate land below, where everything you care of were vanishing with the rising dust.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Liquidation.FinancialReport: Summary of Asset Liquidation Financial Report:
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Liquidation.CapturedAssets: {0} has been delivered as collateral for overdue payments.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Liquidation.Close: The dust has settled. The land returns to silence, awaiting the next poor soul.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.NegotiationText: Given your unauthorized interference with the collection process, the Debt Management Department has determined that the direct write-off cost of this bad debt is too costly. We have sold your debt package to a third-party faction: {0}.\n\nDue to the change in the nature of the debt, your current arrears amount has been increased to {2} Silver due to late payment penalties. The financial connection will be officially closed within 24 hours. After this, your credit record will longer exist. Instead, a new creditors will make indefinite claims on your assets.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.Option.Pay: Pay silver to the new creditor ({0})
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.Option.Refuse: Refuse. Prepare for the liquidation in {0} days.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.BuyoutFail: Payment failed: The silver reserves on the map ({0}) are insufficient to settle the debt ({1}). Prepare for the attack.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.BuyoutSuccess: Debt buyer {0} has received the silver, and all your debts have been fully written off within the framework of Interstellar Law.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.CountdownText: USAC has officially exited your debt contract. Faction {0} now has the right to dispose of all your assets. They have issued an ultimatum: a full-scale seizure operation will begin in {1} days.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.SiegeStartText: The armed debt collection team dispatched by {0} has arrived! They plan to completely destroy your will through relentless attacks over the next {1} days. Endures, or pay the price in blood.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.VictoryText: After paying a heavy price, {0} has officially announced the abandonment of enforcement proceedings against this debt due to excessive losses. Your debt status has been updated to "overdue and void," and from now on, no faction will bother you with this old debt.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.Credits.Title: DEBT_ASSIGNMENT//Report on Transfer of Claims
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.Credits.Intro: Faction {0} has purchased your debt, valued at ₿{1}, from the Debt Management Department through the secondary market.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.Credits.Body: Note: The Debt Management Department always strives for efficiency and balance. When the cost-effectiveness of risk hedging becomes unbalanced, transferring the asset package to a local third party with receiving capabilities is standard procedure.\n\nThank you for being our credit client, we bid you good luck in your future asset restructuring.
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.Credits.Close: "The financial connection has been safely disconnected."
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.Victory.Title: WAR_OF_DEBT//Final war of debt
LanguageData.USAC.Ending.Transfer.Victory.Body: You solved your financial problems in the most primitive and thorough way: By eliminating the creditors.\n\nAfter days of bloody defense, the creditors finally realized that collecting debts from a group of armed to teeth, fanatical colonists was a losing proposition. With the retreat of the last commando unit, the shackles of debt officially snapped. Freedom comes with a price, you have paid in full by creditor blood.
LanguageData.USAC.Alert.SiegeCountdown.Label: Asset seizure countdown
LanguageData.USAC.Alert.SiegeCountdown.ExplanationAct: Defense time remaining: {0}\n\nCurrently defending against a sustained attack from {1}. If you can maintain defensive within the time limit, the opponent will be forced to abandon their claim due to excessive costs.
LanguageData.USAC_DebtSite_WarningLetterText: Given your default during the {0} settlement process, the debt management department has defined your credit rating as "high-risk default." All external credit access has been simultaneously locked. It is recommended that you immediately resume compliance performance to avoid further escalation of the security procedure.
LanguageData.USAC_DebtSite_EscalationLetterLabel: Notice of Change in Compulsory Collection Strategy
LanguageData.USAC_DebtSite_EscalationLetterText: Due to ongoing obstacles encountered in the asset preservation efforts against {0}, the Debt Management Department has determined that conventional recovery methods are ineffective. This means we will no longer attempt any synchronous settlement communications with you, and instead, automated assessment systems will take over the subsequent processes. These systems will deploy necessary long-term, on-site preservation facilities near your location based on security feedback, and their behavior will depend entirely on the compliance of the situation. Please be aware that all secondary damages arising therefrom will be borne by the defaulting party.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.TransferLocked.Title: ACCOUNT_TERMINATED//Confirmation of offshore transfer of asset package
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.TransferLocked.Desc: Service Announcement: In accordance with the risk management agreement, as your credit model has been determined to be a "non-performing asset," the debt management department has officially completed the offshore transfer of this bad debt. This asset stripping action is irreversible. \n\nUSAC has now officially terminated your interface access, and your account is now in a logically segregated state. All subsequent valuation and recovery procedures will be independently executed by the trustee faction. We wish you well in the new cycle.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Negotiation.Title: QUASI-LEGAL_SETTLEMENT//Default settlement proposal
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Negotiation.Available: The system has detected positive cash flow in your account. The debt management department has specifically authorized the opening of a "second chance" asset recovery window. We can discuss how to rebuild our partnership.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Negotiation.Locked: Under the "Patriot Financial Security Act", your account is currently under punitive control. We need to observe at least two consecutive acts of proactive compliance (current assessment progress: {0}/2) before the compliance officer will intervene to reassess your risk. Please continue to demonstrate your commitment.
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Negotiation.Btn: Submit the "Application for Asset Restoration and Default Settlement"
LanguageData.USAC.UI.Assets.Negotiation.Success: Congratulations! Your default waiver agreement has been approved. We have decided to reassess your risk model and your financial access has been restored to standard level. Remember: credit is more important than life.
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.SearchPlaceholder: Search for items, categories, or descriptions...
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.SelectCount: Select {0} for the number of transactions.
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.Summary.Tip_0: Click on the item icon to view details.
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.Summary.Tip_1: You said you didn't want to be here~ (Selected Works of the Chairman of USAC, 3:43)
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.Summary.Tip_2: USAC does not offer currency splitting or change services.
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.Summary.Tip_4: Click the input box to enter precise numbers.
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.Currency.Empty: Orbital network did not detect any legitimate assets within the trade beacon range of the area.
LanguageData.USAC_Currency_BondValue: Credit bond holdings ({0} slips of bond): ₿{1}
LanguageData.USAC_Currency_SmallestBag: The smallest settlement unit in the current inventory: ₿{0}
LanguageData.USAC_Currency_Desc: These assets are directly identifiable by the Orbit Clearing System. USAC will prioritize write-offs via storage units unless you specify priority consumption of physical bonds in your preferences.
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.CannotPlace: Cannot be placed at this location
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.CannotPlaceUnderThickRoof: Unable to deploy under thick roof
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.SelectPlacement: Please select a deployment location for {0} (press Q/E to rotate).
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.DeliveriesDispatched: All buildings have been delivered using transport clamps.
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.CannotOverlapWithPending: Unable to overlap with the pre-planned airdrop area
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.CannotLandOnBuilding: Unable to land on existing buildings
LanguageData.USAC.Trade.NotEnoughCurrency: Payment failed: There is not enough currency (body bags or bonds) within your trade beacon range to settle this bill.
